reliabilityChanges: Semantic freshness, count, and diagnostic checks use one bounded IndexedDB getAll transaction independent of meeting count.
Manual and automatic semantic jobs have a 15-minute whole-job deadline in addition to the two-minute per-batch timeout.
Manual indexing shows meeting and transcript-section progress, supports Cancel, retains complete verified meeting indexes, and resumes remaining work.
Only unique transcribed meetings count toward semantic completion; no-speech and untranscribed recordings cannot create a false permanent deficit.

focusedCoverage: 500-meeting freshness scan uses one bulk read and zero per-meeting reads
exact transcript and embedding-schema index identity
same-ID replacement and altered excerpt exclusion

ios.knownHostGate: devicectl timed out waiting for CoreDeviceService to fully initialize; the previous Xcode 26.3 attempt could not mount a developer disk image for the paired iOS 26.5.2 iPhone.

qualificationBoundary: Build, unit, high-cardinality storage, and rendered browser proof do not prove locked physical 60/120-minute capture, native saved-audio transcription, interruption or memory-pressure delivery during mobile suspension, or destination-app receipt.
